title: Knowledge Representation Using Rules
description: A flowchart demonstrating how a Rule-Based System uses a knowledge base of if-then rules and a working memory of facts to infer new knowledge through a forward-chaining inference engine.
relationships: Inference Engine matches Rules from Knowledge Base against Facts in Working Memory
When a Rule's conditions are met, the Engine fires the Rule
Firing a Rule adds a New Assertion to Working Memory or triggers an Action
